name: posecode-embed
description: Embed a live 3D Posecode movement anywhere with one <script> tag — the <posecode-player> web component.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/auto.ts --bundle --minify --format=iife --global-name=Posecode --outfile=dist/posecode-embed.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/posecode-embed.esm.js
